title: Google's Top TV Show Searches of 2025 Prove It's Time to Start Binging
text: This article presents Google's trending TV show searches for 2025. The piece argues that these shows represent what people watched in 2025 and what they searched for, talked about, and kept coming back to. The top 10 most-searched shows include: The Hunting Wives, described as featuring slow-burning tension and layered characters; The White Lotus, a returning series praised for its dialogue and emotional impact; The Pitt, a grounded drama with emotionally invested storylines; The Summer I Turned Pretty, popular comfort viewing with relationship tension; Squid Game, intense and impossible to look away from; Severance, characterized as smart, unsettling, and deeply addictive; MobLand, a gritty series with compelling characters; Adolescence, emotional storytelling that keeps viewers engaged; Andor, dense storytelling requiring viewer commitment; and IT: Welcome to Derry, a highly anticipated horror series. The article emphasizes these selections reflect viewer preferences for prestige drama, returning favorites, and dark thrillers throughout 2025.
